Hop To It Events Presents

CHEF BATTLE
NATIONALS

February 10 – 12 · Las Vegas, NV
Hofbräuhaus Las Vegas — The national championship
15 City Champions
3 Nights of Battle
1 National Champion
20+ Cities Represented
The Event

THE NATIONAL CHAMPIONSHIP

Chef Battle is hosting its national cooking competition at Hofbräuhaus Las Vegas — three nights, fifteen city champions, one title. From the East Coast to the West Coast and everywhere in between, including Hawaii, these chefs earned their spot through local and regional battles across 20+ cities. Now they're coming to Las Vegas to compete for national bragging rights, a cash prize, and the title of Chef Battle National Champion.

Chefs battle with limited equipment, limited ingredients, and limited time. Each chef is allowed one sous chef to assist. Dishes are judged on appearance, creativity, and taste — with the crowd also casting their votes.

Tournament Format

HOW THE TOURNAMENT WORKS

Night One
PRELIMINARY
February 10 · 5:30 PM
Hosted by Michael Politz
Founder & Editor-in-Chief, Food & Beverage Magazine
8 chefs compete. One hour to create their best dish for the judges, then create bites for the crowd to help decide the top three.
Top 3 advance to Finals →
Night Two
PRELIMINARY
February 11 · 5:30 PM
Hosted by Michael Politz
Founder & Editor-in-Chief, Food & Beverage Magazine
7 chefs compete. Same format — one hour, judges score, crowd votes. Top three move on to battle for the national title.
Top 3 advance to Finals →
Night Three
THE FINALS
February 12
Hosted by Shaun O'Neale
MasterChef Season 7 Winner
The top 3 from each preliminary night — 6 finalists — compete for the ultimate title. One chef walks away as the Chef Battle National Champion.
🏆 National Champion Crowned
The Competing Chefs

15 CHAMPIONS. ONE TITLE.

These chefs competed across 20+ cities to earn their spot. Every one of them is a local champion. Only one will be national.

Your Hosts

THE HOSTS OF THE BATTLE

⭐ Finals Host · Night Three
Shaun O'Neale
MasterChef Season 7 Winner
Shaun O'Neale won MasterChef Season 7 under Gordon Ramsay, beating out tens of thousands of home cooks to claim one of the most coveted titles in culinary television. A passionate DJ-turned-chef, Shaun brought relentless creativity and technical precision to every dish — and he brings that same energy to the Chef Battle Nationals Finals stage. He is your host for the championship night, when the six remaining competitors battle for the title.
Hosting the Finals — February 12
Nights One & Two Host
Michael Politz
Founder & Editor-in-Chief, Food & Beverage Magazine

Michael Politz is the Founder and Editor-in-Chief of Food & Beverage Magazine — the most anticipated source of behind-the-scenes info in restaurant and hospitality. His infectious personality and authoritative knowledge of industry trends draws 12 million readers a month. Snarky, sarcastic, and always in-the-know, Michael brings a seasoned industry lens to Nights One and Two of the preliminary rounds.

Hosting Nights One & Two — Feb 10 & 11

🏆 Chef Battle National Champion
MIKE PASCUA
Chef Battle Nationals — Las Vegas

Congratulations to Mike Pascua, Chef Battle Orange County Winner, on being crowned the Chef Battle National Champion. Mike battled through local, regional, and national competition to claim the title — and the $5,000 prize — in Las Vegas.
